missions.name: Extradition
missions.summary: Contractors secure the extradition of a publicly hated man

briefing.mission:
9 years ago, four 19 year olds and one 20 year old, 3 from Drovak, two local, all of them taking a gap year to travel before school, were brutally murdered by Max Burke.

The travelers were using waterways to camp throughout the region, and had set up camp on the bank of the river opposite of Burke's manor.

Around 3 AM, Burke killed 2 of them outside of their tents while they were out for a walk, and then proceeded to enter the tents, killing two more of the travelers. He then took the remaining traveler hostage, and held her captive in his manor for over 48 hours, before she died of her wounds. Burke himself took part in the search operation looking for her, but eventually K9 units were able to trace the scent to Burke's manor, where they found the last traveler, who by that time had passed away from her injuries. Only the 2 bodies in the tents and the one in the manor were found, as the body of the first two victims were washed away by the river and never found. Burke was charged with 3 counts of second degree murder, and 1 count of criminally impeding a law enforcement operation.

During the trial, Burke's defense team argued that he was mentally unstable, and he claimed earlier in the evening that the travelers had provoked and mocked him while trespassing on his property, although no evidence of this was ever found. Burke had no prior history of violence, but had been living in reclusion since the passing of his wife 13 years prior.

Burke served 19 months in prison before being quietly allowed to return to his manor under house arrest, where he has remained since.

As part of a recent negotiation between Stubbhult and Drovak, Drovak requested the extradition of Max Burke to face charges for the murder of the Drovak citizen that was never recovered. The recent attention on Max Burke has caused his house arrest to become a security concern, and Stubbhult has agreed to the extradition in order to finalize the deal.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Secure the transportation of Max Burke from his home to Saxhult Flygfält

- Check and clear multiple paths to the Manor
- Choose a route to return him to the Airport

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Max Burke will remain in police custody until transfered to Drovak at the airfield
- Minimize his exposure to the public and media
- Obey the orders of the local authorities and law enforcement
- Avoid any unnecessary violence or confrontation
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Drovak Department of State

As per the negotations between Drovak and Stubbhult, the Drovak Department of State has contracted Synixe Contractors to secure the extradition of Max Burke.

A representative from Drovak will be at the airport to take custody of Burke as he boards the plane.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Hostile Civilians
Location: Stubbhult

Burke is a widely despised figure in Stubbhult, and the families and friends of his victims may be hostile.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Stubbhult Regional Police
Location: Stubbhult

The Stubbhult Regional Police are responsible for transporting Burke to the airport.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Observers and Media

Burke's extradition is a high-profile event, and there may be media and observers present at any point.

missions.name: Grandiose Teachings
missions.summary: Contractors are hired to secure a town after a sudden attack

briefing.mission:
A group calling themselves "The True Sons", under the leadership of Pierre Ngunga, have taken control Lijnhaven and surrounding villages.

For the past several years, they have been recruiting Tanoan diaspora to their cause, promising a better, traditional, deserved future on their islands.

The True Sons follow the teachings of their leader, Ngunga, who has been preaching to them that they have a duty to reclaim their homeland from the globalist sellouts currently in power. They have acquired a significant amount of weaponry and resources, and have undergone training to prepare for this attack.

2 hours ago, a C-130 landed at Saint-Geroge Airstrip, full of weapons, ammunition, and supplies. Very soon after, they attacked the nearby town of Lijnhaven, attacking police in the area and the first Gendarmerie responders. The Gendarmerie have setup roadblocks and have held a perimeter around the region, but aren't capable of a full urban assault.

We have been hired to secure the town, assisting any surviving police and Gendarmerie forces, and to neutralize Pierre Ngunga. The True Sons have been broadcasting their attack on social media, so we have a good idea of where they are located within the town. We also know that they have taken several civilian hostages.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Secure Lijnhaven
- Neutralize Pierre Ngunga

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Assist surviving police and Gendarmerie forces
- Rescue civilian hostages

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- As per Gendarmerie orders, no explosives are allowed to be used in settlements, except for breaching charges
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Horizon Island's Gendarmerie
Location: Perimeter around AO

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: The True Sons, led by Pierre Ngunga
Location: Lijnhaven and surrounding villages

Well armed and trained, with a significant amount of resources. Wearing Ngabiri style camoflage (Mudwalker)

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Police and Gendarmerie forces
Location: Inside Lijnhaven

First responders to the attack, have gone dark

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Location: Lijnhaven and surrounding villages

Some civilians have been taken hostage, others have been shot in the streets. Many fled or went into hiding when the attack started.

missions.name: Held in Trust
missions.summary: Contractors pay for the safe extraction of a unwelcome researcher

briefing.mission:
Dr. Adam Szulc, a researcher from the Vranna corporation, working on a project in the area, has been captured by a local militia.

Due to the risks of the region, his corporate insurance company, Kravtsov & Associates, has arranged for his safe extraction in exchange for a ransom payment.

Synixe Contractors has been hired to carry out the extraction.

The other members of the militia are unaware of the ransom agreement with some of their own members, and are still hunting for Dr. Szulc with the intention of executing him as a signal to foreign companies to stay out of the area. They will likely be hostile on sight, but may be able to be bribed.

To maintain the good faith of Kravtsov & Associates, it is important that Jamal Lamrani, the militia member who found Dr. Szulc and agreed to the ransom payment, is not betrayed and the rest of the militia are not made aware of the ransom agreement.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Extract Dr. Adam Szulc
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Kravtsov & Associates Corporate Insurance

A corporate insurance company specialising in high-risk regions

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Local Militia

Angry about previous attempts by foreign countries to extract resources from the area with little benefit to the local population. They are decently armed, but mainly on foot. They know the terrain well.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Jamal Lamrani
Location: <marker name='obj'>Meeting Marker</marker>

A member of the militia, he found Dr. Szulc, but doesn't want to be involved in his execution. He has agreed to a ransom payment.

missions.name: Rocketeering
missions.summary: Contractors destroy rocket artillery after a cross-border attack

briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy 6 rocket artillery vehicles

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Destroy weapon or ammo caches at artillery positions

missions.name: Adept
missions.summary: Contractors use cartel's name to strike at CSP

briefing.mission:
With Asarta's ascension into the CSP alliance they have been inducted into the Peace and Stability program and their first task was supporting law enforcement operations against the Pruszków cartel in the Clara Islands.

Asartan forces have deployed onto the archipelago and have staged their operations at the main airfield. They began systematically disrupting the ground operations of the cartel by patrolling the jungle and raiding houses of important players on the island. Synixe has been hired to strike against the peacekeeping operations and embarrass the newest member of the CSP.

Two hours ago Asartan forces conducted a raid against one of the bosses of the cartel. VIA wants to recover Janusz "Parasol" Prasol. Our employer believes that the search of the property is still ongoing and the target should still be on site while police forces finish the search. Additional targets are the Asarta-held airfield and Gendarmerie's HQ in Santa Isabel.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Bring "Parasol" back to safety
- Stop Asartan operations on the airfield
- Destroy Gendarmerie's motorpool

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Free cartel members
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelian Intelligence Agency

With the arrival of Asartan peacekeepers balance of power in the region has shifted in CSP favor. They have many assets in the cartel's fight against current regime that has been vying for CSP protection for years. Their main objective is to embarras the newest member of CSP. This may force CSP to commit more forces from other memebers to the region, making space elsewhere in the world.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Mafia Pruszkowska

A drug cartel local to the islands that has been a victim of CSP stabilization operations and wants them off the island.
The cartel in the past was supplied with weapons by the Virelian Intelligence Agency to fuel their fight against CSP peacekeepers.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Asartan Expeditionary Force
Location: Airfield

Badly equipped force with some support assets, thrust into the CSP's Peace and Stability program after joining the alliance. They are highly motivated to show their worth on the international stage. After establishing themselves on the airfield they began supporting and leading operations against the cartel.

Name: Local Police

Local police force conducting patrols and on the ground work against the cartel under cover from Asartan Peacekeepers.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Various private security groups
Location: Around important industrial sites

Lightly equipped thugs hired to defend the company's property against the mafia's influence.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians present in the area.

missions.name: Anteater
missions.summary: Contractors rescue a stricken tank

briefing.mission:
Yesterday after heavy fighting inside the town Her Majesty's forces have been beaten back and were forced to withdraw. While retreating, a Pandur IFV has struck an anti-tank mine wounding its crew and passengers, during the ensuing firefight, a Leopard tank "Anteater" was struck in the left track by an RPG, breaking it, the tank turned sharply and the other track walked off. Unable to move and with many wounded among accompanying infantry they were surrounded and cut off. As the gunfight raged into the night, immediate risks were dealt with, but with approaching daylight, it is certain their position is in grave danger. During the night a supply drop from a helicopter has been shot down with shoulder launched surface-to-air missile and crashed into a nearby building.

With Khaybaran forces stretched thin over the frontline, the stricken "Anteater" and its escort need rescuing from their position deep in the town. With dawn soon approaching and reserves still hours away they require assistance. Synixe has been ordered to rescue the tank and its escort.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Repair "Anteater"
- Bring "Anteater" back to safety
- Don't let drone be destroyed

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Support Khaybaran troops

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Main gun is irreparably damaged
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Khaybara

Khaybaran forces lacking manpower in the area are unable to rescue the force left behind in the city.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Luban Liberation front

Militia force concentrated inside the city as wide minefields force Khaybaran units into the chokepoint. The heaviest resistance comes in the north-eastern part of Al Salman where they are holding chokepoints with their support assets.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Khaybara
Location: Eastern Outskirts

Khaybaran forces unable to both hold position and rescue the stricken team, they will remain outside of town until reinforcements arrive. Khaybaran recon drone has been diverted and is in orbit around the encircled troops, standing by to provide overwatch.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians have fled the frontline.

missions.name: Glasshouse
missions.summary: Contractors break out and redeem a prisoner

briefing.mission:
Three days ago, Horizon Islands Police served a warrant for an arrest for Leszek Nawrocki, a young high placed executive doing fieldwork for Integra Group in the Tanoa archipelago, for embezzlement of public funds.

His mother has contracted Synixe to break out her son and clear his name by recovering his work laptop with data that would exonerate him. Leszek is scheduled to be moved from local sheriff's office to police station in Lijnhaven where he will await his trial. Monika Nawrocka has also organized his extraction out of the country. Synixe is tasked to deliver him to a jungle temple for handover.

The whole island is on the edge with Volunteer Guard garrison standing by on the airfield on quick reaction force to respond to incursions by Syndikat.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Rescue Leszek
- Recover Leszek's laptop
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Monika Nawrocka

Mother of Leszek and prominent business woman in the exotic wood industry. She claims her son, Leszek, was unjustly jailed by Horizon Islands Government and blames the company for framing Leszek with embezzlement of public money.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Horizon Islands
Location: Towns

Combination of Gendarmerie and Police forces has significantly cracked down on Syndikat's operations and forced them into hiding. They have set up armed patrols in the towns and along main roads and are cooperating with Horizon Islands Volunteer Guard.

Name: SOLID Security

Livonian security company hired to protect Integra Group operations in the area. They have cooperated with law enforcement and allowed the capture of Leszek.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Syndikat
Location: Jungles of Moddergat

Militia force hiding in the jungle during the recent crackdown. They are paranoid and will fire at contractors.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians have gone into hiding.

missions.name: Heavy Burden
missions.summary: Contractors distrupt militia

briefing.mission:
Anti-government forces have not been contained and recently begun crossing the river. This situation critically endangers the bauxite mines in Mbokoko which significant parts of the Viatkan aviation industry rely on. Upcoming elections make direct military action unfeasible for now and they have contracted Synixe to conduct a swift strike across the river.

Primary target is a mortar battery, currently believed to be stationed in the town of Danashiwa. Second point of interest is the nearby airstrip that is currently being prepared to house GA aircraft that are used for reconnaissance. Additionally Synixe is to raid the maintenance facilities set up in Kyari Kinnai where they convert civilian vehicles into armored technicals.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Silence the mortars
- Take over airstrip
- Damage repair facility

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Capture Hugo Molina
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Viatka

Viatkan government is very concerned with the security of bauxite mining operations in the north of Kujari region. Unable to mobilize support for direct military action, they contracted Synixe to conduct a show of force against the rebellion.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Solo Forza

A popular movement leading a civil war in Mbokoko. They are equipped with varied stolen gear, leading pushes with technicals and terror bombings with mortars. Many of the government's counteroffensives have encountered anti-tank mines on approach and were ambushed near the crossings. With government troops abandoning their positions along the river, the rebels are pushing north and have gained ground in the east. They are led by Hugo Molina, a ruthless former general of the Mbokokan army.

Name: Groupe Valmont

Hired as advisors by an unknown source, they help with operation of specialized equipment and act as personal detail of regional commanders. They also serve as forward observers and call in mortar fire missions.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Mbokokan Gendarmerie
Location: North of the river

Beaten back from the river crossing they have retreated to the north.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians are fleeing the war.

missions.name: Scorched Horizon
missions.summary: Contractors help disrupt communications

briefing.mission:
Last month's election results have been internationally disputed due to the widespread use of the Luban Army to guard the polling places, leading to severe voter intimidation.
The government has said those measures had to be taken due to the terror threat caused by supporters of the Luban Liberation Front.
With the vote blocked in UN Security Council, Mbakoran Army moved in a thunder run into the capital without firing a shot and oversaw the swearing-in of provisional LLF Government.
The Military, in disarray has mostly joined the new government, with small pockets of resistance.

The Khaybaran government, a supporter of the previous regime has vowed to restore peace in Luba. Ahead of the invasion Khaybaran special forces have infiltrated through the frontline to target enemy C2.
With one of the teams missing in the Dariyah region, Synixe was contracted to fulfill their mission of destroying the local cellular network ahead of attack. The invasion will begin at H-Hour with a missile barrage and subsequent mechanized assault into Ben Guerrir. After accomplishing their objectives Synixe is to support assault into Ben Guerrir.

H-Hour has been set for 07:20 local time.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy Radio Masts
- Provide support to advancing force

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Find lost SOF team
- Destroy heavy assets in AO

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Do not enter Al Hariq and Ben Guerrir before H-Hour
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: United Khaybaran States

Khaybaran Government approved Resolution 67 and have begun preparation for an operation to restore the announced winner of the fall election.
Amidst the bombing campaign Khaybaran Special Forces have infiltrated behind enemy lines and destroyed enemy C3 support.
One of the teams has not reported back and lacking manpower they have decided to contract Synixe to finish their mission.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Luban Liberation Front

Supporters of the losing party in the internationally disputed elections. The border area has seen the most resistance and left mostly militia with majority of the troops defecting across the border leaving mostly milita in charge. They wear green armbands.

Name: Mbakora
Location: Frontline

Supporters of LLF, after international condemnation of fall election, they drove tanks straight into capital of Haut-Lomami and have put provisional government of LLF in charge.
Now with the threat of invasion looming they have deployed along the frontline as the primary army in charge.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: United Khaybaran States
Location: Frontline

Her Majesty's Armed Forces are standing by for H-Hour and in this sector their main target is Ben Guerrir.

Name: Luban Union
Location: Pockets of resistance and frontline

Remainder of Luban Army loyal to the previous government. They will be joining Khaybaran forces in the main attack.


<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Location: Towns

Civilian population has been ordered to not leave towns

missions.name: Shadow of Intent
missions.summary: Contractors hunt a terrorist

briefing.mission:
Sadiq Naeem has joined and currently leads IaS in the Manfalat region of Takisan. He and his closest lieutenants are known for wearing ballistic masks to hide their faces. Sadiq himself uses a mask adorned with anime-styled drawing.

IaS has recently seized a base in Garmsar after a heavy gunfight with enemies coming over the hills. Additionally, the base in Feruz Abad has gone silent. In this area, Sadiq's clique is sure to be implicated. Synixe has been contracted to investigate those two threads and produce a body.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Neutralize Sadiq Naeem
<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Bring in Sadiq alive
- Rescue survivors of the attack
briefing.situation:
Six months ago Sadiq Naeem, along with 4 men and two stewards, seized Karskoyan Airlines Flight 67 and have diverted it and subsequently landed it in contested area of Takistan. Most of the passangers and crew have been let free except 5 Karskoyan civil servants who have been summarily executed live on TV based on their government passes.

<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Karskoya

Internationally known terrorist, Sadiq Naeem, who is behind the hijacking of Karskoyan Airlines Flight 67.He has shown himself and security apparatus of Karskoya wants us to produce the body.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Ikhwan as-Sayf
Location: South and east of Rasman

Sadiq Naeem has joined and is leading IaS forces in the Manfalat region of Takisan. Takistani forces describe him as very cunning, known for using subterfuge to bait Taki forces into an ambush. They have recently been supplied with MANPADS by an unknown source.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Takistan
Location: Rasman

After recent defeats, local Takistani forces are in retreat and are primarily holding the airport.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians have fled the immediate area.

missions.name: Sleeping Warrior
missions.summary: Contractors sabotage operations of an army

briefing.mission:
After a swift campaign the island of Haranis has been conquered by Illianzian forces. Over the past weeks they have hunted down local resistance from the former garrison and civilians who picked up arms.

Illanzian tactics consist of a rapid and overwhelming response to threats and they have managed to decimate friendly rebel forces in a very short time. Their forces now are much more spread out on the island and the time to strike is now. Synixe has been contracted to destroy anti-air facilities at Mike-26. The air station also contains significant logistical and intelligence importance to Illanzian forces on the island and previous attempts by FIA have been crushed by wide mobilization of forces in the nearby areas.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy anti-air capability of Air Station Mike-26
- Disrupt helicopter refueling point at Camp Rogain
- Sabotage vehicle storage near Agia Marina
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Nyrland

The occupation of the Island of Haranis by Illianzian forces is unacceptable to the government of Nyrland. Originally supporting the local resistance, with the Illanzians' heavy use of fast reaction forces to quell any local actions they have turned to unconventional means and hired Synixe to disrupt the occupier.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Illanzian Armed Forces

Decently well armed, and very well organized force, known for their prowess in COIN operation by using very flexible and reaction force oriented tactics that have decimated FIA operations. They currently have a transport helicopter and wheeled tank at their disposal.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: FIA
Location: Hiding in forests

Decimated by actions of Illanzian forces they have gone into hiding.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilian life goes on as normal.

missions.name: Under The Canopy
missions.summary: Contractors neutralize threat to aviation

briefing.mission:
Three days ago a chapter of the Sons of Coming Dawn have taken control over the northeastern island of Gull Archipelago, and have burned down Imaska Radar Station and seized its assets. Among the assets were two H215 transport helicopters, one target acquisition radar, two SAM launchers, Wiesel mounted with Stinger missiles and SU-100 in state of disrepair. Synixe has been contracted by the manufacturer to destroy the newly delivered surface to air missile battery due to severe risk to the nearby wind corridor used by civilian aviation. Wrecks of both helicopters remain on base among the rubble but other assets remain unaccounted for.

Yesterday with the arrival of Josonese transport plane and announcement of transfer of arms and training to the militia group, the situation became more dangerous. Synixe is to destroy any found weapon shipments. As of now client believes they haven't yet been moved from the airfield to militia strongpoint of La Mera.

Friendly contact on the ground, a local used car salesman, offered help with transportation and intelligence. He has since gone dark and the pictures he shared before, unfortunately did not possess any EXIF data and are of poor quality. The government wishes for him to be extracted. João Almeida has dragon hand tattoos, ear piercings and has great affinity for golden jewelry.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Neutralize SAM site in Thetra
- Destroy Wiesel armored weapons carrier
- Destroy weapon shipment


<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Recover João Almeida
- Capture Robert Broad
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: MKB Almaz

Rebellion in the archipelago has seized brand new anti air assets that have been sold to the government. Due to reputational risk to the manufacturer, they have contracted Synixe to destroy these assets.

Name: Gull Islands Government

Government has shared on-the-ground intelligence with MKB Almaz via their contact, João Almeida. He stopped responding while scouting a location in Thetra and government wants to retrieve him if possible.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Sons of Coming Dawn

Militia under the leadership of Robert Broad. They have seized the northwestern island and have refused to step down. They have taken control of government's brand new missile battery and an armored weapons carrier.

Name: Joson
Location: Airfield

Josonese Airborne Forces have landed a contingent on the airfield and are currently training local forces on use of newly supplied equipment. Second plane is currently mid-air refueling and will arrive on the island shortly.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Police

Current allegiance of the police force on the island is unknown.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilian presence in the area.

missions.name: One If By Land Two If By Sea
missions.summary: The Virelian Intelligence Service has hired Synixe to extract an operative

briefing.mission:
The Virelian Intelligence Service has hired Synixe to extract an operative.

Undercover operative John Smith has supposedly been arrested for a traffic incident in Drovak. Before his real identity is discovered he needs to be extracted.

Contractors will be transported to the Drovak coast under cover of night aboard the CS Artful. Once ashore contractors will have to find their own land transportation. Contractors may be able to acquire civilian vehicles in the nearby coastal towns of Nizhnoye and/or Solnichniy. Once transportation is acquired, Virelian intelligence believes that their Agent Smith may have been arrested by police from either Dolina or Mogilevka and may be being held in one of their jails.

Virelian intelligence stresses that we are to leave no trace of our being here. If contractors are engaged they are to leave no witnesses that can identify them.

While brief skirmishes with local police may go unnoticed, prolonged encounters are far more likely to cause issues. Contractors are advised to avoid the naval port in Electrozavodsk. If the Drovak military is alerted to the contractors presence they will most likely respond with air support from their nearby carrier group. Contractors are advised to not be followed back to the rendezvous. If a tail is detected, the captain of the Artful has orders to submerge and leave the contractors behind in order to remain undetected.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
Extract agent John Smith alive.

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
Leave no witnesses that can identify contractors or point to any involvement of Virelia.

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
Do not be followed back to the CS Artful.
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelian Intelligence Service


<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Drovak Police and Military
Location: Police can be found throughout the region at stations or patrolling. The nearest military base is a port in Elektrozavodsk, there is also a carrier group stationed off the Souterhn coast.

Police should be lightly armed and armored. If John Smith's cover is blown then state police may be involved and will be far better equipped. The Drovak military is well armed and has several naval and air assets in the region.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: CS Artful
Location: South East of Solnichny

Virelian nuclear submarine tasked with delivering and extracting the contractors.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Drovak General Public
Location: Throughout the region.

While most citizens are probably sleeping, not everyone has a day job.

missions.name: Back On The Grind
missions.summary: Contractors are tasked with delivering aid

briefing.mission:
Recently a small scale civil conflict has erupted in Chernarus, with a group of government dissidents comprised by local disenfranchised young men wreaking havoc on the Chernarussian countryside.

With supplies and services being cut off to the towns in the region, IDAP has established several relief points throught the countryside. Since they are worried that these men will open fire on aid workers while they deliver supplies, they've opted to hire Synixe for the deliveries.

Contractors must deliver the required supplies to the different IDAP camps and centres while adhereing to the restrctions stipulated. There is also an IDAP train outbound from the Elektrzavodsk Railyard meant to deliver supplies to which contractors must deliver supplies. Contractors failing to adhere to these restrctions could result in the contract being cancelled.

Delivery list:
- Elektrzavodsk Railyard: Equipment kit (Supply box, Exposives box and Uniforms Box), truckload of food, 8x box of medical supplies
- Kozlovka: 2x Heap of grain, 2x Heap of rice, 2x box of medical supplies
- Putoshka: 4x box of medical supplies
- Stary Sobor: Equipment kit (Supply box, Exposives box and Uniforms Box), 4x box of medical supplies

Contractors have been provided with IDAP trucks for easier delivery of the supplies, with the truck bound for the railyard having already been loaded.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Deliver aid to the different IDAP locations

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Aid any civilians that are encountered

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Contractors must not participate in any engagements while in the IDAP camps and centres.
- Contractors must not carry any weapons while riding in IDAP marked vehicles or while within IDAP camps and centres.
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: International Development and Aid Project (IDAP)
Location: Chernogorsk, Elektrzavodsk Railyard, Kozlovka, Putoshka, Stary Sobor

Founded in mid 1916, the IDAP is a Dutch NGO that specialises in responding to natural and man-made disasters. Since its founding, the IDAP has provided humanitarian aid to more than sixty million people worldwide and continues to run missions throughout the Green Sea region, Central America, Southern Europe, West Africa, and the South Pacific.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Local Rebel Group
Location: Myshkino

They are equipped with old surplus weaponry that was previously owned or was recently acquired by its members. Reports have them wearing surplus gear as well, mostly composed of chest rigs.

missions.name: Cold Out Here
missions.summary: Contractors are tasked with recovering sensitive assets

briefing.mission:
Early in the morning, Site 7-B belonging to the Fjord Intelligence Agency was attacked by Groupe Valmont with the intent of obtaining several sensitive assets.

The assets consist of communications equipment along with servers that were prepped for transport in an Astra van, a device currently under R and D and three chemical containers.

Before Groupe Valmont could fully take over the facility a fireteam made it out of the site with the device in the back of a HEMTT truck. They're currently waiting in Port Nervei for an extraction.

For the time being Groupe Valmont has been contained to the Norrfjorden bay, as a roadblock was quickly established south of Igeldas to prevent them from heading South and the team at the Nervei Port has not seen any movement headed West.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Recover the sensitive items stolen by Groupe Valmont

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Minimise damage to any buildings
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Fjord Government

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Groupe Valmont
Location: Area near the Norrfjorden bay

Well equipped with a variety of weaponry and vehicles at their disposal

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Fjord Army
Location: Port Nervei, south of Igeldas

A well equipped army. They lack any heavy assets in the AO.

missions.name: There's A Bomb In My Car
missions.summary: Contractors recover stolen vehicles

briefing.mission:
Last night a break in occurred at Bakir Bahrami's villa near Zargabad; a local militia group paid off his previous security team and made off with Bahrami's car collection.

As such, he's hired Synixe to track down and recover his vehicles. Thanks to witness accounts we know the approximate locations of most of the vehicles; they have been marked on your maps in yellow. It has also been reported that the militia has broken into the airport with trucks carrying Jeeps.

Bahrami's collection consists of the following:
- Arcadian: Black in color, with the license plate BIG POPPA
- Jeep: White in color, with the license plate JEEPERS
- Hatchback: Blue with a livery, with the license plate TOP GOONER
- SUV: Red in color, with the license plate NOT POOR
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Recover the client's vehicles
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Bakir Bahrami
Location: The Villa

An influential Takistani businessman who's made most of his money via exporting goods.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Local Militia Group

They are known to operate in the areas near Zargabad and are armed with a mix of surplus weaponry. They are also known to have access to some vehicles as well as emplacements.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Private Security Forces
Location: The Villa

Tasked with protecting the employer's villa, they will not aid contractors.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Civilians are present in the AO.

missions.name: Not Here Again
missions.summary: Contractors extract Virelian asset

briefing.mission: Ikhwan as-Sayf has captured a Virelian asset they want retrieved. Synixe is tasked with locating the HVI, Satty Mmith, and extracting him back to the airfield.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Extract Satty Mmith to the airfield

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Minimize civilian interaction and engagement
briefing.situation:
Virelia has tasked Synixe with rescuing a captured HVI, Satty Mmith in the village of Masjid Ahmad. Intel reports he is being held in a compound on the southern end of the village.

<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelia

Virelia has previously contracted advisors into the area that were not as efficient as hoped.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Ikhwan as-Sayf
Location: Spread throughout the area.

Insurgency group focused on obtaining control of the area.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Takistani Military
Location: Military Bases and Airfields

Local military fighting the insurgency. Virelia has advised minimizing interaction beyond what is necessary for the scope of the mission.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Civilians

Virelia has requested minimal to no civilian interaction by contractors.

missions.name: Broken Wing
missions.summary: Contractors are tasked with retrieving a data box from a downed drone

briefing.mission: The Virelia has a clandestine intelligence gathering mission operating in and around Illanz. The island nation has been flirting with joining Calvane's growing sphere of influence for some time now. Unfortunately, a MQ-47C sentinal belonging to the Virelian Intelligence Agency (VIA) was shot down over Illanz. Synixe has been hired to retrieve data box aboard the drone before it can be retrieved and analyzed by Illanz forces.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
Retrieve the data box from the drone and return it to the FOB or the alternate extraction site

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
Do not leave behind any items, bodies, or weapons that may compromise Synix's involvement
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelian Intelligence Agency
Location: Island of Antigua

The VIA has had a remote listening station off the coast of Illanz for sometime now. Synixe has been shipped onto the island ahead of it's operation on Illanz. The VIA has provided Synixe with a number of boats to reach the main island with. Once there, vehicles can be procedured from a Illanz National Guard motorpool. Reports have it that their communication tower was recently damaged in a storm, leaving the unit based there with poor options for communications.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Illanz National Guard, Illanz Army, Illanz Air Force
Location: In and around the AO

The Ilanz national guard is equipped with basic rifles and light body armor. The motorpool mentioned above should have a number of vehicles for Synixe to utilize. 

The Illanz Army is very well equipped, having modern rifles, medium-heavy body armor, and IFV's. They are stationed Camp de Ferdinand Foch, as well as elsewhere.

The Illanz airforce is based out of Base aérienne de Saint-Brieuc. There is a large rotary wing stationed there, as well as a SAM unit and a sizeable compliment of special operations peronnel.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Illanz Citizenry
Location: Across the island

There will be some civilian's in the AO however, the majority of the population is located in the central and southern parts of the island.

missions.name: Rocinante
missions.summary: Contractors retake industrial sites

briefing.mission: Synixe has been hired by Donnager-Kwik (DK) Industries to re-take a number of their sites in the Hellanmaa region. Last month, a criminal collective overran their steel and refining plants. While Synixe was contracted immediately after the seizure by DK, our timeline for arrival has been sped up due to the collective threatening to blow up the plants should their demands not be met. DK wishes for us to reclaim their sites, defuse the explosives, and retrieve their fleet of vehicles.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Retake the Kouras plant
- Retake the Jankos Plant
- Defuse all explosives

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Secure and transport all 5 of Donnager-Kwik's trucks back to the FOB

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- None of the explosives must be allowed to go off
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Donnager-Kwik Industries

Donnager-Kwik has hired Synixe to retake their sites, defuse the planted explosives, and return their fleet of trucks to the FOB. 

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Criminal Collective 
Location: Kouras Plant, Jankos Plant, AO

Made up of bands of organized criminal elements, the group has access to small arms, AT, some CSWs, at least 6 large explosives planted at the two sites, as well as IEDs and other explosives of unknown yield. The group has made it known that they will detonate their large scale explosives between 0800 and 0840hrs should their demands not be met. Intel suggests they may have a staging base at or around Hoopakka   

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Civilians

There is a scattering of civilians throughout the AO.

missions.name: Theotokos
missions.summary: Contractors must rescue captured relief workers

briefing.mission: Aid workers led by Priest Kajetan Sadłowski of the Virelian Orthodox church, whom were delivering aid to wartorn Gullanabba, have been captured by the Synowie nadchodzącego świtu, a communist insurrectionist group with claims on portions of Stubbhult. A demand letter has been sent to the Stubbhult government demanding a ransom along with the government recognizing the groups territorial claims. Synixe has been hired to rescue the hostages.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Rescue Priest Kajetan Sadłowski
- Rescue Paweł Kurek
- Rescue Sebastian Nowakowski
- Return all captives to FOB Bonhomme
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelian Government

Kajetan Sadłowski is a high profile leader the Virelian Orthodox Church, known for his charitable work. The Virelian government has a vested interest in seeing Sadłowski returned safetly
 
<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Synowie nadchodzącego świtu (Sons of the Coming Dawn) (SNS)
Location: AO

A insurrectionist group to whom has financed their rebellion through robbery and other illicit means. They are equipped with myriad small arms, some AT weaponry, and limited body armor. They have access to some wheeled vehicles, as well as a number of CSW's. There is also the possibility that the SNS has access to mines and other explosives. It is unknown at this time where the SNS has sequestered the hostages.


<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Stubbhult civilians
Location: Throughout the AO

Most civilians have fled the AO however some still remain - unable to evacuate.

missions.name: Shadow On The Sun
missions.summary: Interdiction behind enemy lines

briefing.mission:
The Kingdom of Nyrland has quietly accelerated its chemical weapons program, relying on foreign expertise to bypass international oversight. Four civilian scientists—experts in synthesis, delivery systems, and battlefield deployment—were covertly contracted to design and refine Nyrland’s next-generation chemical agents.

Intelligence confirms that these scientists are now operating from within Nyrland’s interior, carrying sensitive research data and prototype materials. Their work represents a direct threat to regional stability and to Virelia’s strategic partners.

A defector from Nyrland delivered the scientists’ arrival window and transport schedule, bargaining the information for the safety of himself and his brother.

- The scientists are expected to arrive at Vinje Airfield at approximately 09:25
- Forward team departs from Vinje Airfield to Floten Factory at 09:40, ETA 09:50
- Scientists' convoy departs from Vinje Airfield to Floten Factory at 09:45, ETA 09:55

Additional Information:

The Nyrlander Armed Forces shouldn't be expecting any attacks within their borders, however they are a professional military force. Expect the Nyrlander Armed Forces to stage rapid QRF within several minutes.

The defector, Miłosz Rabinowitz, didn't show up for his shift at Vinje Airfield this morning. The Nyrlander Armed Forces will likely expect his involvement. He and his brother, Julius Rabinowitz, have taken refuge in an abandoned farmhouse south of Floten.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Capture and extract the scientists
- Secure any laptops, tablets, mobile phones and hard drives

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Extract the defector and his brother

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Nyrland must not suspect Virelian involvement
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelian Intelligence Agency

The VIA has arranged a safehouse for Synixe to operate from, and vehicles will also be provided to ensure a clandestine presence in Nyrland.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: The Kingdom of Nyrland
Location: Vinjesvingen

Vinjesvingen was a sparsely populated region in Nyrland. Due to a heightened military presence and the increase in weapons research and development, most civilians have left the region. The military occupies the airfield in the south, an FOB in the north-west, a weapons factory in Floten and a military police outpost in Myrbo.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Nyrlanders

Most, if not all civilians have left the region due to economic, health and safety concerns.

missions.name: Haystack
missions.summary: Contractors search for internet celebrity

briefing.mission:
Tomasz "Van Life" Lis is a prominent travel vlogger and his most popular series is "Czy tak strasznie w...", in which he travels to war-torn nations with his van and asks people about their daily life post-conflict. He has not gone online for 2 days after arriving in Luba. Our employer wants him back safely and doesn't want anyone to know he was ever in any danger.

His last communication with his girlfriend was a text message saying that he was going to the Joul region next. His agency also picked up a tip that he was visiting workers at the niobium mine near Abad.

For this trip he wanted to rebrand his van, so unfortunately there are no public pictures of it after he repainted while in the Luban capital, and his cryptic Instagram post only showed blue automotive paint.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Bring "Van Life" back home
- Recover "Van Life" vehicle

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Don't let Tomasz be seen publicly
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Inflow Ltd.

Influencer agency specializing in travel vloggers. Their best-known talent, Tomasz "Van Life" Lis, has gone missing during his trip to Luban province of Joul. They want him brought back to safety, and they want it to be done privately.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Ikhwan as-Sayf

Local militia group linked with Takistan-native group of the same name, taking advantage of ongoing Luban civil war, they control many of the more rural areas in Joul.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians present in the area.

missions.name: Dropping By
missions.summary: Contractors sabotage enemy capabilities

briefing.mission:
With the Altian civil war drawing to a close the remainder of the Old Altian Army troops have holed up in the vicinity of Oreokastro.

Intelligence confirms that they are bringing in troops from Stratis to be armed at Oreokastro so that they can later start pushing out of the area in an attempt to keep fighting.

As such Synixe has been hired to move into the area, and destroy the ammunition supply by any means they see fit.

Contractors will be conduct a HALO insertion over the northern coast, where a NAR SOF diver team will be waiting for them with a crate containing any supplies they cannot carry on the plane.

Procedure for the jump is as follows:
1- All contractors except one board the aircraft
2- The remaining contractor speaks with the local airport worker to initiate the takeoff sequence
3- The remaining contractor quickly boards the aircraft
4- As the aircraft approaches the jump location, the pilot will call "Go, go, go"
Contractors will be dropping from 4500 meters.

Once they achieve their objective contractors can extract to an alternate location in an old power plant.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy the Old Altian Army's ammunition supply

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Do not leave behind any trace of contractor involvement
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: New Altis Republic Government, Central Intelligence Agency

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Old Altian Army
Location: Area near Oreokastro

They possess a wide range of vehicles and are mostly armed with Galil-style rifles. They are usually equipped with light vests

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: NAR (New Altis Republic)
Location: Gear Drop Off Location

An SOF diver team composed of four men, along with an SDV.

missions.name: Tiptoe
missions.summary: Contractors rescue a VIS asset

briefing.mission: A VIS asset, Fadey Zharkov, has been captured by members of the Luban Liberation Front. Synixe has been tasked with retrieving him and safely delivering him to the airfield designated Hotel.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Extract Fadey Zharkov to the airfield designated Hotel

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Collect any intel
briefing.situation:
A VIS asset, Fadey Zharkov, has been captured by members of the Luban Liberation Front. Synixe has been tasked with retrieving him and safely delivering him to the airfield designated Hotel.

<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelian Intelligence Service (VIS)

The VIS has provided intel on Zharkov's last known location, a compound designated Quebec, as well as the Luban Liberation Front. They have arranged insertion via Ghost Hawk, as well as a flight out of the country for Zharkov originating at the airfield designated Hotel. 

They believe Zharkov to be alive, but is concerned he will be non-ambulatory.

They have also relayed intel that several vehicles have been moved by what they believe to be friendly assets to the area designated VRP Bravo. Zharkov was their largest asset in the region, so they have been unable to completely validate this intel.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Luban Liberation Front
Location: Spread across the main peninsula.

A self-proclaimed liberation force that has gained considerable influence due to recent destabilization in the region. Intel reports they are well-equipped and are known to have roving patrols that sometimes include technicals.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Civilians
Location: Entire Region

Civilian consideration should be paramount, as the region is already spiraling into instability.

missions.name: Slow Day At The Office
missions.summary: Rescue a diplomat in a city overrun by enemies

briefing.mission:
A Virelian diplomat was en route to visit the Grand Mosque of Maghdoot Khel when his convoy was attacked by members of the Swift Response Battalion.

This is peculiar because Maghdoot Khel is Ikhwan as‑Sayf territory. Virelian Intelligence has informed us that the IAS and SRB forces have been fighting over the region. ISR has revealed that the HVI has been moved to a building near the ambush site, and IAS forces are amassing to the south of the city
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Rescue the Virelian diplomat

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Rescue any survivors of the attack
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelian Department of State

The State Department has requested Synixe to respond to the attack and rescue the Virelian diplomat, as they are the closest friendly force capable of this kind of operation.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Swift Response Battalion

The SRB does not traditionally operate in this region, but it is believed that a power struggle between the IAS and SRB has pushed the SRB into Takistan to weaken the IAS’ claim to the area.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Khaybaran Peacekeepers
Location: Maghdoot Khel

Peacekeepers from the Khaybaran Armed Forces are guarding two diplomatic outposts in Maghdoot Khel. They have orders to defend these outposts and will not be able to assist in rescue operations.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Ikhwan as-Sayf

The IAS will not tolerate SRB forces carrying out operations on their turf. They will likely move to regain control of the city. They are also considered hostile.


<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Takistani Locals
Location: Everywhere

Maghdoot Khel is a densely populated city; civilians are everywhere.

missions.name: The Last Gift of Christmas
missions.summary: With Santa tracking done for the year, disaster strikes

briefing.mission:
Santa Claus was done with his delivery of presents, and returned back to the North Pole.

NORAD had tracked his sleigh, but now that the deliveries were complete, operations had shut down for the year. His security detail had gone home to spend the days following Christmas with their families, their hard work and sacrifices appreciated but no longer needed.

The world had started to forget about Santa again, until next November when the stores would switch their playlists once again.

This was exactly what the Grinch had been waiting for. With Santa's security detail gone, with eyes turned away, it was the perfect time to strike.

Santa has been kidnapped. Secret demands have been made, and if they are not met, Santa's fate is uncertain.

Santa's elite security team, the Special Northern Operations Wing (SNOW), have been dispatched to rescue him. Negiotiates with the likes of the Grinch will not be entertained.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Secure Santa Claus and extract him

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Locate and neutralize Grinch operatives in the area

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- No negotiations with the Grinch will be entertained
- Keep fighting and Santa out of view of civilians
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Special Logistics & Emergency Incident Ground Headquarters


<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Grinch Operatives

Hellbent on ruining Christmas, these operatives are well-equipped and trained for specialist tactics. They are believed to be armed with a variety of weapons and explosives, and are operating under the command of the Grinch himself.

missions.name: Synixe Training Facility
missions.summary: Premiere Training Facility for the Synixe Corporation

missions.name: Nur al-Sahra
missions.summary: Contractors work with Takistani forces to fight an insurgency and restore stability

briefing.mission:
The Wahat Nura Province of Takistan has been a hotbed of insurgent activity in recent months.

Virelia and the IEA are concerned about destabilization in the region, which could spill over into neighboring countries.

We have been hired by the IEA to assist in stabilizing the area, by advising the local Takistani forces, and conducting high value raids to dismantle insurgent operations.

Resupplies will be few and far between, so conserve your resources and plan accordingly.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Objectives will be provided on-site by the Takistani commander.
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Integrated Economies Alliance (IEA)
Location: HQ in Virelia

Concerned about regional stability in Takistan, the IEA has contracted your unit to assist local forces in countering insurgent threats in the Wahat Nura Province.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Ikhwan as-Sayf
Location: Wahat Nura Province, Takistan

A well-armed insurgent group operating in the Wahat Nura Valley, known for guerrilla tactics and ambushes. They are equipped with small arms, RPGs, and light vehicles. Their motive is to destabilize the region and undermine local governance.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Takistani Military
Location: Various bases in Wahat Nura Province

The Takistani Military has a small presence in the region, made up of local soldiers with limited training and equipment. They are cooperative but require guidance and support to effectively counter the insurgent threat.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Takistani Militia
Location: Various locations in Wahat Nura Province

The militia consists of local villagers and military deserters who have taken up arms to defend their villages. Their allegiances can be fluid, and they may either assist or hinder operations depending on the situation.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Many civilians in the Wahat Nura Valley are caught in the crossfire between insurgents and military forces. They may have family members involved with one or more of the factions. They may report on activities to any side.

missions.summary: Contractors work with Takistani forces to fight an insurgency and restore stability

- Meet with the Takistani commander

missions.name: Nur al-Sahra - Day 2
missions.summary: Contractors work with Takistani forces to fight an insurgency and restore stability

briefing.mission:
The Wahat Nura Province of Takistan has been a hotbed of insurgent activity in recent months.

Virelia and the IEA are concerned about destabilization in the region, which could spill over into neighboring countries.

We have been hired by the IEA to assist in stabilizing the area, by advising the local Takistani forces, and conducting high value raids to dismantle insurgent operations.

Resupplies will be few and far between, so conserve your resources and plan accordingly.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Objectives will be provided on-site by the Takistani commander.
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Integrated Economies Alliance (IEA)
Location: HQ in Virelia

Concerned about regional stability in Takistan, the IEA has contracted your unit to assist local forces in countering insurgent threats in the Wahat Nura Province.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Ikhwan as-Sayf
Location: Wahat Nura Province, Takistan

A well-armed insurgent group operating in the Wahat Nura Valley, known for guerrilla tactics and ambushes. They are equipped with small arms, RPGs, and light vehicles. Their motive is to destabilize the region and undermine local governance.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Takistani Military
Location: Various bases in Wahat Nura Province

The Takistani Military has a small presence in the region, made up of local soldiers with limited training and equipment. They are cooperative but require guidance and support to effectively counter the insurgent threat.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Takistani Militia
Location: Various locations in Wahat Nura Province

The militia consists of local villagers and military deserters who have taken up arms to defend their villages. Their allegiances can be fluid, and they may either assist or hinder operations depending on the situation.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Many civilians in the Wahat Nura Valley are caught in the crossfire between insurgents and military forces. They may have family members involved with one or more of the factions. They may report on activities to any side.
